title: UP Kannauj ECCE Educator Outsourcing Recruitment 2026 in India - Apply Now

About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Basic Education department is responsible for the education system in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

For more information, please visit the official website of Uttar Pradesh Basic Education.

About the Programme

The UP Kannauj ECCE Educator Outsourcing Recruitment 2026 aims to recruit 195 ECCE Educators in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

The programme is open to candidates who have a graduation with Home Science OR 2 Year Nursery Teacher Training (NTT) OR CT (Nursery) OR DPSE (Diploma in Pre-School Education) OR Any other equivalent ECCE / Nursery Teacher Training qualification.
